description_long: This object is a compact, modern revolver-style handgun with a robust, matte black finish. The frame is thick and angular, featuring a prominent trigger guard and a contoured grip designed for ergonomic handling. The cylinder is short and wide, suggesting a snub-nose configuration, and the top of the frame is equipped with a Picatinny rail for mounting accessories. The grip is deeply curved with a smooth surface and subtle finger grooves, providing a secure hold. Minimalistic slide markings and a lack of visible external safety levers give it a streamlined, tactical appearance.
description: A compact, matte black revolver-style handgun with a contoured ergonomic grip and a Picatinny rail on top. Its robust frame and short barrel give it a modern, tactical look.
description_view_0: The handgun is viewed directly from the front, showing the circular muzzle and the width of the barrel and cylinder.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the full profile, including the Picatinny rail, trigger, and the detailed grip contouring.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the back of the grip and the rear sight alignment, with the cylinder and hammer area visible.
description_view_3: The right side view displays the opposite profile, showing the cylinder, grip, and the angular frame design.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is deeply contoured with a pronounced curve, designed to fit comfortably in the hand. Its surface appears smooth with subtle finger grooves for improved ergonomics, and the material has a matte, slightly rubberized look. There are no visible logos or embellishments, giving it a clean, functional appearance. The lower portion of the grip flares slightly, enhancing stability during use.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is thick and robust, with a rounded front and a slight undercut at the rear for improved finger placement. Its size is generous, allowing for gloved use, and the edges are smoothly contoured without any aggressive texturing or reinforcement. The design is utilitarian, focusing on protection and accessibility.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short and wide, consistent with a snub-nose revolver profile. It is integrated into the frame with no visible threading, porting, or compensator features. The exterior is finished in matte black, matching the rest of the handgun, and lacks any visible markings or embellishments.
attribute_slide_markings: There are minimalistic markings on the frame near the front, consisting of a few shallow diagonal lines for visual interest. No manufacturer logos, model names, serial numbers, or caliber designations are visible on the slide or frame in the provided views.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: As a revolver, this handgun does not feature a traditional magazine base or floorplate. The grip base is smoothly rounded and slightly flared, with no visible finger rests, logos, or texturing, maintaining a streamlined and ergonomic profile.
